name: openEuler sig-ROS SIG
description: The ROS SIG group is committed to porting ROS to openEuler in order to lower the threshold of use of openEuler in the field of robotics and promote the popularization of openEuler users in the field of robotics

name: openEuler sig-ROS SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-ROS SIG maintains 734 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-ROS SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The ROS SIG group is committed to porting ROS to openEuler in order to lower the threshold of use of openEuler in the field of robotics and promote the popularization of openEuler users in the field of robotics. The SIG has 9 core members and maintains 734 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-ROS SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-ROS SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at ros@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-ROS SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-ROS SIG maintains 734 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-ROS.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-ROS SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-ROS SIG has 5 Maintainers, including: wuwei, anchuanxu, wangxiaoyun. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
